parameters.subsql: SELECT * FROM mart.listing_leadgen WHERE crm_presence_status = 'not_in_crm' AND leadgen_phone_key IS NOT NULL AND leadgen_created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hour'

dataset.description: Витрина маркетингового мэтчинга лидов классифайдов с CRM

result_schema.title: periods
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF IFNULL([period], 'Месяц') = 'День' THEN
    DATE([leadgen_created_at_3c8f])
ELSEIF IFNULL([period], 'Месяц') = 'Неделя' THEN
    DATETRUNC(DATE([leadgen_created_at_3c8f]), 'week')
ELSE
    DATETRUNC(DATE([leadgen_created_at_3c8f]), 'month')
END
result_schema.formula:
IF IFNULL([period], 'Месяц') = 'День' THEN
    DATE([leadgen_created_at])
ELSEIF IFNULL([period], 'Месяц') = 'Неделя' THEN
    DATETRUNC(DATE([leadgen_created_at]), 'week')
ELSE
    DATETRUNC(DATE([leadgen_created_at]), 'month')
END
